mapper.select: SELECT id, name, name_kana, address1, address2, phone_number, mail_address, username, password, created_at FROM customer WHERE mail_address = #{mailAddress}
SELECT id, name, name_kana, address1, address2, phone_number, mail_address, username, password, created_at FROM customer WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer (name, name_kana, address1, address2, phone_number, mail_address, username, password) VALUES (#{name}, #{nameKana}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{phoneNumber}, #{mailAddress}, #{username}, #{password})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE mail_address = #{mailAddress}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE username = #{username}
